display: Ranchi — Location of Yogananda's school in Bihar, India. Founded 1918.
Rabindranath Tagore — Nobel laureate poet. Yogananda visited his Shantiniketan school.
Rajarsi Janakananda — Foremost disciple of Yogananda. First successor as SRF president.

text: Rabindranath Tagore and I Compare Schools
Rama Is Raised From the Dead
